freeDelivery.description: Free delivery on purchases of 1000 som and above

payment.title: Payment
payment.description: We accept both cash and online card payments

qualityGuarantee.title: Quality Guarantee
qualityGuarantee.description: Original products only from verified suppliers

specialOffers.title: Special Offers
specialOffers.description: Our store always has discounts and promotions for regular customers

aboutCompany.title: About Company
aboutCompany.intro: Our company is a team of professionals in the field of security systems and smart technologies, which has been successfully implementing projects of various complexity for private, commercial and government facilities for over 10 years.
aboutCompany.specializationTitle: We specialize in design, supply, installation and maintenance of:
specializations: smart locks and Smart Home solutions
aboutCompany.goalText: Our goal is to create safe, smart and efficient spaces using modern technologies and practical experience.
footer: The company works directly with trusted manufacturers and factories, including those from China, which allows us to offer competitive prices, original equipment and flexible cooperation terms. Dealer conditions are available for corporate clients and partners.

Our team consists of more than 20 specialists: engineers, designers, technical department, sales department, marketing and accounting. This approach allows us to support the client at all stages — from consultation and design to launch and service maintenance.
We value quality, reliability and responsibility, so we implement each project taking into account safety standards, technical requirements and client objectives.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: By providing your data on this website, you agree to its processing.
privacy.subHeading: We collect and use personal data (name, phone, email and other information provided by you) exclusively for:
list: providing information about our products and services.
footer: Your data is not transferred to third parties without legal grounds and is protected in accordance with legal requirements.
The website may use cookies for proper operation and to improve user experience.
You can request changes or deletion of your data at any time by contacting us through the contacts provided on the website.

termsOfUse.title: Terms of Use
termsOfUse.intro:
By using this website, you agree to these terms. 
All information on the website is for informational purposes only and does not constitute a public offer, unless otherwise specified.

administration.title: The website administration reserves the right to:
list: • change the content of the website without prior notice;
• update prices, descriptions of products and services;
• restrict access to the website if necessary.

users.title: Website users agree to:
list: • provide accurate information when filling out forms;
• not use website materials without the copyright holder's permission.

footer: All website materials (texts, images, logos) are protected by copyright law. Copying and distribution without the copyright holder's consent is prohibited.
The website administration is not responsible for possible interruptions in the website's operation and for the actions of third parties.

brandsPage.title: Our Manufacturers and Brands
brandsPage.description: In our work, we use equipment only from trusted and reliable manufacturers who have established themselves in the international market. This allows us to guarantee stable system operation, high quality and compliance with modern safety standards.
brandsPage.subtitle: We collaborate with leading brands:
brandsPage.conclusion: We select equipment individually based on client needs — from budget solutions to professional systems for large facilities. All deliveries are accompanied by technical support, warranty and service maintenance.

courseDetails.title: Video Surveillance Systems Courses
courseDetails.description: Learn video surveillance systems from scratch! This course is for those who want a new profession or additional income. No fluff — only what is really needed for work. Learn to install, configure, and maintain modern video surveillance systems from scratch.
program: Analog and hybrid video surveillance systems
Selecting equipment according to client needs
Installation and proper connection of cameras
Common mistakes and how to avoid them
benefits: Understanding principles of video surveillance systems
Support and answers during and after the course
Possibility to receive certificates from top brands Hikvision and Dahua
footerCourses: Course list: ACS — Access Control System
FAS — Fire and Security Alarm Systems
Training and preparation for project implementation

dataStorage.title: Data Processing and Storage Systems
dataStorage.subtitle: We build reliable data processing and storage systems for uninterrupted access to information from industrial and network equipment

links.wireless: Wireless Broadband Access and Radio Relay Line

dataStorage.armtelDescription: Our own equipment brand for building reliable communication and security systems: public address, dispatcher, operational-technological communication, alerting, and other related engineering networks

features.title: We design and implement IT architectures
features.text: We develop custom data processing and storage systems that fully match the tasks and scale of your business

features.title: We organize backup and disaster recovery
features.text: We create reliable data protection schemes that ensure business process continuity

features.title: We virtualize and consolidate IT infrastructure
features.text: We optimize the use of hardware resources, reduce operating costs, and simplify IT environment management

features.title: We provide technical support and monitoring
features.text: We carry out round-the-clock monitoring of system performance, proactively identify potential issues, and promptly fix any failures

dataStorage.solutionsSubtitle: that create a fault-tolerant and scalable infrastructure

complexSolutions.title: Comprehensive solutions
complexSolutions.intro: Ready-made hyperconverged infrastructures (HCI) and converged systems:
items: combine compute resources, data storage, and network components into a single system
enable rapid turnkey deployment of IT infrastructure at a new production site
ensure high reliability and data availability for all participants in the production process

infraBlocks.title: Server hardware
infraBlocks.text: High-performance computing platforms capable of withstanding heavy loads (sensor and SCADA data processing) and operating under increased vibration and dust conditions (industrial server racks)

infraBlocks.title: Data storage systems (DSS)
infraBlocks.text: Reliable storage for: archived production process data, incident logs and reports, backups of mission-critical systems

infraBlocks.title: Network components
infraBlocks.text: High-speed switches and adapters for building LAN networks on the production floor: resistant to electromagnetic interference, supporting industrial protocols (Modbus, Profibus, etc.), with low data transmission latency

infraBlocks.title: Software
infraBlocks.text: Programs for backing up data from industrial controllers and servers; real-time monitoring of equipment and IT infrastructure status; storage management and providing data access from operator workstations

items.label: End-to-end virtual channels:
items.text: creation of secure logical connections between network nodes, regardless of the transmission medium

items.label: Flexibility for hybrid network design:
items.text: ability to encapsulate and transport various protocols (IP packets, Ethernet, ATM). Integration of heterogeneous network equipment.

items.label: Accelerated data transmission:
items.text: label-based forwarding without deep per-packet inspection, which speeds up routing

items.label: Infrastructure consolidation:
items.text: no need to maintain separate networks for different types of traffic

items.label: Traffic optimisation:
items.text: built-in mechanisms for managing and optimising data flows to improve reliability and performance

controlMonitoring.title: Control and Monitoring System

acros.title: ACROS
acros.description: addressable control and monitoring system from Armtel, designed for remote control, diagnostics and monitoring of electrical equipment

acrosLeft: Monitoring the status of each individual endpoint device
Tracking dangerous electrical circuit conditions (short circuit, open circuit)
Equipment performance diagnostics and error logging
acrosRight: Automatic device management eliminating human factor
Ability to integrate enterprise equipment management systems into a centralized platform
implementationLeft: Quickly obtain information about the status of endpoint equipment
Clearly present information on laptop/map/enterprise plan
Increase equipment and power network service life
implementationRight: Log errors, automatically receive reports on device status
Reduce operating costs for endpoint equipment maintenance

applications.title: Applications
applications.description: remote control of equipment groups and individual addressable control, support for wired and wireless devices, as well as integration with other systems due to compatibility with common protocols

images.isometricAlt: Facility diagram: industrial site, workshop, warehouse, perimeter

integration.title: Integration with Armtel Info Monitoring platform
integration.subtitle: for smart enterprise management
integration.description: Armtel Info Monitoring Dispatch Center — a top-level platform based on a situational-analytical approach for monitoring facility infrastructure and ensuring process safety

monitoringFeatures: Control and management of engineering infrastructure

alerting.title: Comprehensive control of notification and communication systems

alertingFeatures: monitors the performance of light and voice notification equipment automatically, analog and digital communication channels/networks for exchanging notification signals, as well as feeder lines to loudspeakers and lines for activating sirens and notification lamps when transmitting signals and notification information
starts and stops the testing process of light and voice notification equipment via web interface
creates, deletes outdated and searches for notification points by specified criteria

soUsta.title: Emergency Alert System for terrorist threat (SO at USTA)
soUsta.subtitle: a set of technical and software tools for promptly informing people about the threat or fact of a terrorist attack

links.sou: Emergency Notification and Evacuation Control Systems

soUsta.armtelDescription: Own brand of equipment for building reliable communication and security systems: voice alarm, dispatch, operational-technological communication, notification and other related engineering networks
soUsta.conflictTitle: Eliminate system conflicts and panic during evacuation
soUsta.conflictSubtitle: the system ensures evacuation of personnel along the fastest and safest route
soUsta.methodologyTitle: Our own design methodology for SO at USTA guarantees:
methodologyItems: ensuring unobstructed evacuation flow according to the scenario
soUsta.scenariosTitle: We provide clear sequential evacuation scenarios for personnel
soUsta.scenariosSubtitle: the smart system automatically implements the optimal scenario
scenarios: Synchronizes broadcast of alerts from various systems
Broadcasts voice messages about the nature of the threat
Launches alert scenarios depending on the location and type of threat, facility specifics
Provides the ability to trigger alerts by the operator

cards.title: Notifying not everyone at once, but those in danger
cards.text: The system detects the penetration zone and outputs messages first to the floor and areas under threat. Other zones receive instructions with a delay or remain in standby mode until the situation becomes clear.

cards.title: Optimal equipment quantity without overpayment
cards.text: Arman engineers perform acoustic calculations and select equipment of the required power. This allows placing it only where necessary for audibility and compliance with standards, eliminating errors and rework.

cards.title: Systems work in coordination, without conflicting with each other
cards.text: For example, during a fire — they open evacuation routes; during a break-in threat — they lock doors to prevent intruders from entering.

cards.title: Coverage of the entire enterprise territory: offices, industrial workshops and sites
cards.text: Synchronous notification inside buildings and on the facility territory. Armtel equipment in industrial design is resistant to vibration, dust and extreme temperatures.

soUsta.integratorTitle: As an integrator, we take responsibility for all stages of project implementation
integratorItems: We provide a full range of services from audit to commissioning and further maintenance
We design from scratch or integrate with already installed systems
At the design stage, we develop various alert scenarios: all possible combinations of threats and alarm button triggers
soUsta.labTitle: We check the correct operation of the system before deployment
soUsta.labText: The Arman laboratory has a test bench where we practice integration with fire and security systems and access control systems, and test zoning scenarios.
soUsta.requirementsTitle: The solution ensures compliance with requirements

requirements.label: Federal Law No. 35-FZ "On Countering Terrorism"
requirements.text: – establishes the basic principles of countering terrorism, legal and organizational frameworks for terrorism prevention and combating it, minimizing and (or) eliminating the consequences of terrorism manifestations.

requirements.label: Decrees of the Government of the Russian Federation
requirements.text: – establish mandatory organizational, engineering, legal and other measures for various industries to ensure anti-terrorist protection of facilities (territories) of industry, including requirements for notification systems.

requirements.label: GOST R 71934-2025
requirements.text: – forms requirements for newly developed and modernized alert systems in the event of a threat or commission of a terrorist act in order to inform people in premises or on open territories (water areas) of facilities, as well as actions necessary to protect life and health, minimizing possible damage.

soUsta.tk234Title: We are members of the technical standardization committee "Alarm Systems and Anti-Criminal Protection" (TC 234).
soUsta.tk234Text1: We guarantee that the solution meets safety standards.
soUsta.tk234Text2: We are among the first to learn about significant changes that set the direction for system development and enhancement.

footer.title: Move from disparate devices to a unified communication ecosystem
footer.subtitle: We will calculate the cost of the project and connect at any stage of implementation

skud.title: Access Control and Management Systems
skud.subtitle: Software and hardware complex for automatic restriction and registration of entry-exit of people and vehicles to a given territory.
skud.armtelDescription: Own brand of equipment for building reliable communication and security systems: voice alarm, dispatch, operational-technological communication, notification and other related engineering networks
skud.controlSubtitle: Office premises, industrial sites and facilities
skud.toolTitle: Access Control System — a tool for crisis management and business efficiency growth
securityItems: the system effectively restricts access to the territory for unauthorized persons, ensuring protection of material assets, equipment and information;
differentiation of access rights between employees to different premises minimizes the risks of internal theft.
timeTrackingItems: the system accurately records the time of employee arrival and departure;
automatically accounts for lateness, early departures, absenteeism and overtime;
this data can be integrated with accounting systems for accurate payroll calculation.
operationalItems: ACS (Access Control System) allows remote monitoring and management of all access points in real time;
the system allows tracking the number of personnel in a given room, minimizing enterprise risks;
the system can be integrated with video surveillance, fire and security alarm systems, creating a unified security complex.
scenarioItems: the system allows creating unique scenarios necessary for security and savings;
scenario examples: contactless elevator and floor call, turning lighting and ventilation on and off, control of technological equipment.
speedItems: a lost or compromised access card can be instantly deactivated in the system and a new one issued;
access rights are configured and changed within minutes.

components.label: Identifier:
components.text: user authentication means. Can be presented in the form of:

components.label: Reader:
components.text: a device that reads the identifier code and transmits it to the controller. There are three types of readers:

components.label: Controller:
components.text: the brain of the system that makes the decision to grant access. The controller compares the code received from the reader with the database and determines whether access is allowed to the user.

components.label: Actuator:
components.text: a mechanism that physically controls access. Actuators include:

components.label: Auxiliary equipment:
components.text: additional devices necessary for correct system operation:

footer.subtitle: We will calculate the cost of the project and connect at any stage of implementation

securityAlarm.title: Security Alarm System
securityAlarm.subtitle: A set of technical means for detecting intrusion or attempted intrusion into a protected facility and transmitting alarm notifications for measures to detain the intruder.
securityAlarm.armtelDescription: Own brand of equipment for building reliable communication and security systems: voice alarm, dispatch, operational-technological communication, notification and other related engineering networks
securityAlarm.regimeTitle: Security measures — no longer just a formality
securityAlarm.regimeSubtitle: We ensure their compliance at all levels

securityItems.label: Comprehensive protection of material assets:
securityItems.text: The system allows building multi-level security. Includes perimeter protection (fences, gates), premises, particularly protected objects (equipment, data centers, safes).

securityItems.label: Preventive effect and demoralization of intruders:
securityItems.text: The presence of a security alarm system, especially with visible sirens and warning signs, serves as a powerful deterrent for potential intruders.

securityItems.label: Rapid response and damage prevention:
securityItems.text: When triggered, the signal instantly goes to the security console. The operator can dispatch a rapid response team to the facility. This minimizes the time between intrusion detection and response, preventing or reducing damage.

securityItems.label: Raising the overall security level:
securityItems.text: The security alarm system integrates into the enterprise's overall security system. It may include video surveillance systems, access control systems and other components.

components.label: Sensors (detectors):
components.text: provide detection of intruders by various signs:
items: magnetic contact (for monitoring doors, windows, gates);

components.label: Control Panel (CP):
items: collection and processing of signals from sensors;

components.label: Notification devices:
components.text: include light and sound sirens designed to deter intruders; alarm notifications.

components.label: Alarm transmission devices:
components.text: ensure transmission of alarm messages to the security console through:

components.label: Auxiliary equipment:
components.text: includes devices necessary for managing the security system:
items: key fobs and other means for arming/disarming the facility.

footer.title: Move from disparate devices to a unified communication ecosystem
footer.subtitle: We will calculate the cost of the project and connect at any stage of implementation

videoSurveillance.title: Security and Technological Video Surveillance
videoSurveillance.subtitle: Software and hardware complex for video control, recording and analytics.
videoSurveillance.armtelDescription: Own brand of equipment for building reliable communication and security systems: voice alarm, dispatch, operational-technological communication, notification and other related engineering networks
videoSurveillance.headerTitle: Turning video surveillance into an incident prevention tool
videoSurveillance.headerSubtitle: Predictive analytics instead of data accumulation

advantages.text: Automatic analysis and recognition of faces and objects
Unlimited number of cameras and remote access to recordings

videoSurveillance.benefitsTitle: Video surveillance as part of integrated security systems

benefits.label: Incident prevention:
benefits.text: The system allows visual control of the situation, preventing offenses and documenting any incidents.

benefits.label: Scalability based on current infrastructure:
benefits.text: Digital systems can be easily expanded by adding new cameras and equipment, without major restructuring of the existing infrastructure.

benefits.label: Personnel optimization:
benefits.text: The system allows monitoring facilities in real time and viewing archived recordings from anywhere in the world via computer or smartphone — subject to company information security policies. Software allows separating access rights by roles, functions, shifts, etc.

benefits.label: Unified security complex without duplicating systems:
benefits.text: The video surveillance system (VSS) can integrate with integrated security systems (ISS), such as: access control systems, fire and security alarm systems, occupational safety and fire safety systems.

benefits.label: Intelligent video analytics and rapid response to deviations:
benefits.text: Modern systems can automatically: analyze video, recognize faces and license plates, count people, detect abandoned objects, detect personal protective equipment (PPE), track dangerous zone crossings, conduct video analytics of technological processes and much more.

benefits.label: Optimization of data processing and storage costs:
benefits.text: There is an option to rent cloud servers for video storage and processing. This eliminates the cost of expensive equipment. Cloud storage increases data reliability.

benefits.label: Fault tolerance:
benefits.text: Industrial systems have redundancy capabilities for reliable data storage and uninterrupted operation in critical conditions.

components.label: Cameras:
components.text: analog, IP, network, indoor, outdoor, fixed and PTZ (pan-tilt-zoom).

components.label: Recording and processing devices:
components.text: provide recording, storage and processing of video signals; these include video recorders and video servers.

components.label: Automated workstation (AWS):
components.text: devices for displaying video in real time and viewing archived recordings.

components.label: Software:
items: manages system operation: viewing, recording, video analysis, integration with other security systems;
provides centralized system management: access rights configuration, employee database management, reporting and event logs.

components.label: Auxiliary equipment and cable infrastructure:
items: provides power supply for all system components and transmission of video signals and data;
in IP systems, PoE (Power over Ethernet) technology is often used for this, simplifying installation;
use of a shared or dedicated data network is possible.

footer.title: Move from disparate devices to a unified communication ecosystem
footer.subtitle: We will calculate the cost of the project and connect at any stage of implementation

fireSafety.title: Fire Alarm and Automation of Fire Protection Systems (FAS)
fireSafety.subtitle: A set of technical means for detecting signs of fire, generating commands to activate notification and evacuation control systems and automatic fire extinguishing systems.
fireSafety.armtelDescription: Own brand of equipment for building reliable communication and security systems: voice alarm, dispatch, operational-technological communication, notification and other related engineering networks
fireSafety.fireAlarmSubtitle: Allows taking measures at an early stage and minimizing possible consequences

fireSafetyItems.label: Ensuring personnel safety:
fireSafetyItems.text: The main priority is the life and health of people. The system allows for organized evacuation before critical conditions occur.

fireSafetyItems.label: Automation of fire management:
fireSafetyItems.text: The system automatically changes the operation of building engineering equipment to create safe conditions for evacuation: turns on air supply, turns off ventilation, opens emergency exits.

fireSafetyItems.label: Integration and synergy with other systems:
fireSafetyItems.text: The fire alarm activates the automatic fire extinguishing system (AFES), transmits a signal to the security console or the Ministry of Emergency Situations. This creates a unified, comprehensive security loop.

fireSafetyItems.label: 24/7 autonomous operation and documentation:
fireSafetyItems.text: The system operates 24/7 without human intervention. Modern fire alarm systems keep a log of all events (alarms, faults), which helps in incident investigation and inspections by supervisory authorities.

fireSafetyItems.label: Risk reduction and compliance with legal requirements:
fireSafetyItems.text: Having a working fire alarm system is a mandatory requirement for most industrial enterprises. Installing the system allows compliance with fire safety standards and avoiding fines.

fireSafetyItems.label: Ready to work with ARMTEL SOUE:
fireSafetyItems.text: Full compatibility with the ARMTEL notification and evacuation control system.

apsComponents.label: Fire detectors (sensors):
items: Smoke — react to smoke particles in the air;
Flame detectors — react to optical radiation of open fire;
Combined — combine several detection methods for increased reliability.

apsComponents.label: Manual fire call points (fire alarm buttons):
items: Allow a person to manually trigger a 'Fire' signal.

apsComponents.label: Auxiliary equipment:
items: UPS (uninterruptible power supplies) ensure system operation during main power outages.

fireSafety.auptSubtitle: Provides localization and elimination of fire, transmission of signal to external circuits

auptItems.label: Rapid response:
auptItems.text: AFES detects and starts extinguishing a fire at the earliest stage, before human intervention or the fire brigade, preventing the development of a large fire.

auptItems.label: Minimizing damage and fire localization:
auptItems.text: Rapid extinguishing prevents the spread of fire, protecting not only the main equipment but also adjacent areas, raw material and finished product warehouses.

auptItems.label: Ensuring people's safety:
auptItems.text: The system not only fights fire but also promotes safe evacuation, including notification and blocking the spread of smoke and fire.

auptItems.label: 24/7 readiness and autonomy:
auptItems.text: AFES operates independently of human presence, providing protection during non-working hours. Some system modules do not require external power supply.

auptItems.label: Protection of building structures:
auptItems.text: Timely extinguishing prevents the collapse of load-bearing structures under the influence of high temperatures, preserving the integrity of the building.

auptItems.label: Ready to work in the most difficult conditions:
auptItems.text: Including at critical infrastructure facilities and facilities with explosion protection requirements.

auptComponents.label: Fire detection means:
items: sensors and detectors (heat, smoke, flame) that record ignition factors.

auptComponents.label: Control panel and control console:
items: generates commands to control all system elements.

auptComponents.label: Fire extinguishing agent (FEA) tanks:
items: containers for storing extinguishing agents: water, foam concentrate, gas, powder or aerosol.

auptComponents.label: Pumping equipment:
items: creates the necessary pressure for transporting FEA through pipelines;
used in water, foam and some powder systems.

auptComponents.label: Pipelines and shut-off valves:
items: system of pipes, valves and gates;
distributes FEA from tanks to sprinklers.

auptComponents.label: Sprinklers (sprayers):
items: directly sprays FEA in the protected area.

telephoneCommunication.mainTitle: We provide communication between offices and production for rapid decision-making
telephoneCommunication.mainSubtitle: A unified communication system combines office IP phones, industrial communication and notification systems, dispatch centers

advantages.title: Cover all working areas
advantages.text: office, remote production and facilities, call center, monitoring center and control room in one network

advantages.title: Stable connection
advantages.text: reliable communication according to critical facility standards based on IP and/or analog communication

advantages.title: Automated monitoring and call recording
advantages.text: Call Recording System records all calls, PBX manages call flows

objectNotification.title: Facility and Local Notification
objectNotification.subtitle: Building fault-tolerant communication systems for monitoring, process management and instant personnel notification in extreme industrial conditions.
objectNotification.armtelTitle: Armtel software and hardware complex — a hub for seamless integration of all communication and notification channels
features: Provides instant direct communication for technological process and personnel management.
Allows implementing several systems on the basis of one equipment.
objectNotification.durabilityTitle: Armtel system is resistant to harsh industrial conditions

durabilityItems.text: Housings resistant to chemicals and abrasives

objectNotification.localSubtitle: Provides notification in case of possible and actual emergencies

localNotificationItems.label: Multifunctionality:
localNotificationItems.text: delivery of voice and sound information to employees on the enterprise territory and inside buildings

localNotificationItems.label: Integration according to legal requirements:
localNotificationItems.text: civil defense and emergency system for local notification system, fire alarm system for notification and evacuation control system

objectNotification.armtelInfoSubtitle: Software for building a unified notification and monitoring system at the enterprise

armtelInfoItems.label: Control and monitoring of multiple systems in one interface:
armtelInfoItems.text: operational, public address, emergency communication and emergency notification

armtelInfoItems.label: Forecasting and modeling of emergency situations and their consequences:
armtelInfoItems.text: calculation of hazardous chemical damage zone

armtelInfoItems.label: Increasing reaction speed during potential and actual emergencies:
Receiving commands from higher-level notification systems:
Integration according to legal requirements:
armtelInfoItems.text: civil defense and emergency system for local notification system, fire alarm system for notification and evacuation control system

objectNotification.standardsTitle: Armtel-Info complies with all necessary regulatory requirements
standards: GOST R 22.7.05-2022 National Standard of the Russian Federation. Safety in emergency situations. Local notification systems in areas of potentially dangerous facilities. General requirements.
GOST R 42.3.01-2021 "Civil Defense. Technical means of public notification. Classification. General technical requirements"
Order of the Ministry of Emergency Situations of Russia and the Ministry of Digital Development dated 07/31/2020 No. 578/365 "On approval of the Regulation on public notification systems"

diller.title: Partnership with Baitech
diller.description: Partnership with Baitech is an opportunity to strengthen your market position and attract new customers. Baitech successfully operates in the field of video surveillance and computer components, having established itself as a reliable supplier and stable business partner. Since its first days, the company has focused on cooperation with trusted manufacturers that ensure high product quality and professional support.
diller.requestText: Leave a request for a wholesale price list, and our manager will contact you shortly.

timeSync.title: Time Synchronization Systems
timeSync.subtitle: We implement precise time synchronization systems for process synchronization at your facility

links.wirelessBroadband: Wireless Broadband and Radio Relay Line

timeSync.armtelDescription: Own brand of equipment for building reliable communication and security systems: voice alarm, dispatch, operational-technological communication, notification and other related engineering networks

features.title: Design time synchronization systems for your facility
features.text: We develop individual architecture taking into account the specifics and needs of the customer.

features.title: Install and configure equipment 'turnkey'
features.text: We perform a full cycle of work on installation of primary and secondary clocks, control systems.

features.title: Integrate with IT infrastructure and security systems
features.text: We ensure time synchronization of servers, access control systems, video surveillance and other technological systems of the facility.

features.title: Provide ongoing maintenance of time synchronization systems
features.text: We carry out round-the-clock monitoring of system performance, proactively identify potential problems and quickly eliminate faults.

timeSync.syncTitle: We organize precise time synchronization at your enterprise
timeSync.productsTitle: We offer comprehensive time synchronization systems for industry:
timeSync.productsSubtitle: Full range of equipment for precise time synchronization

products.title: Primary clock stations
products.text: Certified devices with support for synchronization via GPS/GLONASS, wired channels or industrial networks.

products.title: Secondary clocks
products.text: Industrial-grade equipment with enhanced protection against dust, moisture and mechanical impacts. Resistant to aggressive environmental conditions (temperature changes, vibration, chemical exposure).

products.title: Synchronization equipment with SCADA and APCS systems
products.text: Specialized devices for integration with production equipment via NTP/SNTP protocols.

products.title: Switching equipment
products.text: Solutions for reliable signal transmission in industrial interference conditions.

products.title: Redundant systems with autonomous power supply
products.text: Comprehensive solutions for uninterrupted operation: built-in batteries, backup power sources and automatic time recovery mechanisms in case of failures.

footer.subtitle: We will calculate the cost of the project and connect at any stage of implementation
